data.title: Ferrari Updates Commercial Policy Amidst Import Tariff Concerns
data.description:
Ferrari ( (IT:RACE) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 27, 2025, Ferrari announced an update to its commercial policy in response to potential import tariffs on EU cars into the USA. While maintaining current commercial terms for certain models, Ferrari will implement up to a 10% price increase on other models, affecting its profitability margins slightly. Despite these changes, Ferrari remains confident in meeting its financial targets for 2025.

More about Ferrari

Ferrari N.V. is a prominent player in the luxury automotive industry, known for its high-performance sports cars and commitment to excellence. The company focuses on delivering premium vehicles with a strong emphasis on innovation and client satisfaction.

Average Trading Volume: 396,388

data.title: NDTV Announces Trading Window Closure in Compliance with SEBI Regulations
data.description:
New Delhi Television Limited ( (IN:NDTV) ) has shared an announcement.

New Delhi Television Limited has announced the closure of its trading window in compliance with SEBI’s insider trading regulations. This closure will be in effect from April 1, 2025, until 48 hours after the company declares its audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2025. This move is part of the company’s adherence to regulatory standards, ensuring transparency and fairness in its financial disclosures, which is crucial for maintaining investor trust and market integrity.

More about New Delhi Television Limited

New Delhi Television Limited (NDTV) operates in the broadcasting industry, primarily offering news and current affairs programming. It is a prominent player in the Indian media landscape, known for its television news channels and digital content, catering to a wide audience across the country.

YTD Price Performance: -29.88%

Average Trading Volume: 23,482

Current Market Cap: 7.37B INR

data.title: LaFleur Minerals and Granada Gold Mine Collaborate on Milling Assessment
data.description:
LaFleur Minerals ( (TSE:LFLR) ) has shared an announcement.

LaFleur Minerals has signed a Memorandum of Understanding with Granada Gold Mine Inc. to assess the feasibility of processing mineralized material from the Granada Gold Project at the Beacon Gold Mill. This collaboration could lead to a commercial agreement and further studies to evaluate the project’s economics. The MOU facilitates technical data exchange and preliminary assessments, with the potential to create a low-cost, profitable mining operation. The Beacon Gold Mill’s restart aligns with LaFleur’s strategy to benefit from elevated gold prices, aiming for significant revenue generation.

More about LaFleur Minerals

LaFleur Minerals Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on gold production and processing. The company owns the Beacon Gold Mill in Val-d’Or, Québec, which is capable of processing over 750 tonnes per day. LaFleur Minerals aims to capitalize on rising gold prices by restarting the Beacon Gold Mill and targeting custom milling of mineralized materials from nearby deposits.

YTD Price Performance: 4900.0%

Average Trading Volume: 6,423

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $7.72M

data.title: DP Aircraft I Secures New Lease Agreements with LOT Polish Airlines
data.description:
The latest update is out from DP Aircraft I ( (GB:DPA) ).

DP Aircraft I Limited has announced new 12-year lease agreements with LOT Polish Airlines for its two Boeing 787-8 aircraft, commencing in late 2026. This strategic move allows the company to cancel its existing lease extensions with Thai Airways, positioning itself favorably in the market by securing long-term agreements with a well-established airline. The company is also exploring refinancing options as its current debt arrangements are set to expire alongside the Thai leases. This development is expected to enhance DP Aircraft’s operational stability and market positioning, while also addressing the demand for Boeing 787s amid production delays.

More about DP Aircraft I

DP Aircraft I Limited operates within the aviation leasing industry, focusing on leasing aircraft to airlines. The company primarily deals with Boeing 787-8 aircraft and aims to maximize shareholder value through strategic lease agreements and asset management.

YTD Price Performance: 20.0%

Average Trading Volume: 83,989

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Gold Fields Releases 2024 Annual Reports and Announces AGM
data.description:
Gold Fields ( (GFI) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 27, 2025, Gold Fields published its 2024 suite of annual reports, which include the Integrated Annual Report, Annual Financial Report, Governance and Remuneration Report, and other key documents. These reports, which reflect no changes from the previously reviewed financial results, provide comprehensive insights into the company’s financial, operational, and sustainable development activities. The annual reports are available on the company’s website, and the audited financial statements received an unqualified opinion from PwC Inc. The company’s AGM is scheduled for May 28, 2025, allowing both in-person and electronic participation.

More about Gold Fields

Gold Fields is a globally diversified gold producer with operations across Australia, South Africa, Ghana, Chile, and Peru, and a project in Canada. The company boasts an annual gold-equivalent production of 2.1 million ounces, with significant gold Mineral Reserves and Resources. Its shares are listed on the Johannesburg Stock Exchange and its American depositary shares trade on the New York Exchange.

data.title: Mogotes Metals Initiates Geophysical Survey at Promising New Claims
data.description:
An announcement from Mogotes Metals Inc. ( (TSE:MOG) ) is now available.

Mogotes Metals Inc. has commenced a geophysical survey on newly optioned claims near the Filo del Sol deposit, aiming to explore extensions of its undrilled Meseta and Cumbre targets. The reconnaissance has identified promising geological features, such as breccia zones and stockwork veinlets, which suggest potential porphyry-style mineralization. This development could enhance the company’s exploration strategy and strengthen its position in the mineral-rich Filo Del Sol district.

More about Mogotes Metals Inc.

Mogotes Metals Inc. is a mineral exploration company focusing on copper and gold in the Vicuña district of Argentina and Chile. Its flagship project, Filo Sur, is adjacent to the significant Filo del Sol copper-gold-silver discovery and is part of a mineral-rich belt that includes other notable deposits.

Average Trading Volume: 333,841

data.title: VEON Secures USD 210 Million Term Loan, Enhancing Financial Flexibility
data.description:
An announcement from VEON ( (VEON) ) is now available.

On March 27, 2025, VEON Ltd. announced the successful syndication of a 24-month, USD 210 million senior unsecured term loan from a consortium of international lenders, including ICBC Standard Bank and leading GCC banks. This new financing strengthens VEON’s liquidity position and enhances its financial flexibility, reflecting strong market confidence in the company’s strategy and financial health.

More about VEON

VEON is a digital operator providing converged connectivity and digital services to nearly 160 million customers across six countries. The company focuses on technology-driven services that empower individuals and drive economic growth, and it is listed on NASDAQ.
